title: Sentinel Shield installation record
description: Records what the installer placed into a consuming project, written to .sentinel-shield/installation.json. Lets sync/upgrade reason about managed vs project-owned files and which tools are enabled. Contains NO secrets, tokens, or credentials (repository MUST NOT carry credential userinfo).

schema_version.description: Installation-record schema version. Fixed at '2' for this contract; lets readers detect older/newer record shapes.

version.description: Sentinel Shield version that performed the install/sync, e.g. '2.0.0'.

resolved_commit.description: Immutable commit the installer was sourced from (full or abbreviated hex SHA). Optional; recorded when known so upgrades are reproducible.

repository.description: Source repository as 'owner/repo' or a credential-free URL. MUST NOT contain userinfo ('user:token@host'), query ('?'), or fragment ('#') — credential/token carriers are rejected.

profile_schema.description: tool_policy_version of the profile manifest that was installed (lets upgrades detect policy-schema drift).

tool_mode.description: Provisioning mode used at install/sync time (matches install-baseline.sh --tool-mode), recorded so future updates are deterministic.

installed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the FIRST install, e.g. '2026-06-27T12:00:00Z'. Preserved across re-installs/syncs.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent install/sync/migrate that wrote this record.

managed_files.description: Project-relative paths Sentinel Shield owns and may overwrite on sync.

project_owned_files.description: Project-relative paths created once or owned by the project; never overwritten.

enabled_tools.description: Tool keys active in this installation.

disabled_tools.description: Tool keys explicitly disabled in this installation.

last_successful_sync.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent successful sync-baseline run. Optional; absent until the first sync.

last_upgrade_from.description: Sentinel Shield version this installation was last upgraded from. Optional; absent on a fresh install.
